title: Meatloaf Wellington
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°.
Mix the ground beef, onion, salt and pepper to taste, egg, ¼ cup gravy and the breadcrumbs. Form the meat into loaf and place in a pan.
Bake for 45 minutes and drain the fat. Separate the crescent rolls and cover the entire meatloaf overlapping the triangles. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Serve with gravy.
